author: David R.
pros: Configuration is done by a GUI which makes it easy to setup initially but options make the tool even more powerful. I'm learning every day about alternative ways to return even richer data for example using regular expressions or scraping data from popups.
cons: With such an advanced feature set, it is often not obvious how a feature works. The documentation is okay and there is a healthy community of active users willing to help (and even some YouTube How-To videos) but I've had to invest a lot of effort into learning to use the product properly. Suggest a guided tutorial from start-to-finish highlighting the features. Individual FAQs are documented, but the entire workflow would be helpful.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best value solution for scraping Web data
description: I've used and taught with WebHarvy for about 3-4 years. I use it for research and industry projects. My experience has always been positive. The software is easy to use and pulls data as needed. It is also fast and further updates from its inception have made it only faster. Any question is responded quickly and professionally from the tech support staff, including customized code one might need to scrape difficult websites. Overall WebHarvy is truly a "hidden gem" in the arena of web scraping.
author: Cesar Z.
pros: WebHarvy is easy to use, is able to pull the data I need from most websites, and is priced at an affordable level for any type of organization including even entrepreneurs and small startups.
cons: I would like to see a Mac version of WebHarvy.

review_title: Most workable solution for mining data from any website. Works best with Amazon and ebay to get data
description: best tool in market for data mining
author: Muhammad T.
pros: The most best part of this software is that tutorials are available on youtube.com for many big websites. Configuring a mining project is also very easy and you get many hints from videos and other blogs
cons: Scrapping stop from time to time and you need to keep an eye all the time to resume. Unattended operation for big data is not possible and sometime you loose data after several days of scarpping

description: Fantastic. They actually gave me videos showing me how to implement a couple of scrapers we were working on.
author: robert A.
pros: I'm very pleased with the quality and support of this product. It has a bit of a learning curve in performing certain functions.
cons: It's a bit too developer centric in some of its functionality. A developer will have to support certain functions that require RegExs in order to work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It helped me doing my master thesis
author: Egle S.
pros: I have downloaded few web scraping programmes and I spent days trying to figure out how to use them. In the end I tried Webharvey and I was using it within minutes . Also, it took time figuring out how to do the pagination of booking comments, and I wrote an email to the support and got the answer within an hour. To sum up its a great tool to scrap comments for those who dont programm.
cons: It takes around 4 hours to scrape thousands of comments but I understand that the programm has to open every page individually and the speed depends more of the page that you scrape the comments from
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: User friendly and new update increase the speed of scraping
author: Renata A.
pros: I wrote a previous review saying how user friendly this software is and that for me the down side was that it was slow to scrape when compared to other softwares that do the same thing. This new update (6.0.1.173) increased the speed to scrape. So, this software is my choice for this task. The support team always give you fast and helpful support, sometimes providing you even pieces of code to help you use it.
cons: You can always increase the speed of scraping.

description: I want to gather accommodation data for a web site
author: Willem N.
pros: It seems potent. Hopefully it can do what I need. I can get my money back within 15 days if not satisfied.
cons: After functioning for one day it ceased to work. It simply won't open. The customer support is slow or non-existent over weekends. I don't know how to get it started again.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: super smooth and very advanced without being overly complicated
author: Alexander F.
pros: the best thing is not being charged monthly loads of customizeability and great support team
cons: nothing no issues only haggle would be the speed but i wouldnt say its slow by any means as i would rather have accurate data over incomplete data

description: My experience with WebHarvy has been very positive—I highly recommend it
author: Xenia P.
pros: WebHarvy is intuitive and easy to set up, making data scraping effortless even for non-technical users. The technical support is outstanding—they respond promptly to any questions. The value for money is excellent.
cons: It would be helpful to have a comprehensive user manual that clearly explains each button and function.

review_title: WebHarvy-Easy To Use, Incredible Fast Response Support With Very Detail Video Guide
description: I am trying to find an efficient and accurate way of capture web data and transfer the data into excel format for further analysis. WebHarvy has met my objectives and I will have the flexibility of saving a configuration, edit and deploy again and again, saving much valuable time and money.
author: Henry H.
pros: To me, the support given by the WebHarvy Support Engineer, is of upmost importance. As a new user, whenever I am not sure of any step in "How To do this or that", I am able to rely on their 5 Stars quality responses. It is easy to apply the software's algorithm to configure my specific requirement for web data.
cons: I would like to learn more about the use of Regular Expression.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best scrapper with ease to use
author: Ankur G.
pros: The best part is crawling front page details from platforms within minimum time. Saves time by running as back end
cons: For few platforms it takes over night to give result which I can get within an hour from other software

review_title: WebHarvy - the best Web scraping tool so far
description: I am satisfied because it can do really a lot and does not cost a lot of money in comparison to its possibilities.
author: Patrycja K.
pros: 1.It is efficient and precise. 2. I can use extra proxies to hide mu own one and prevent it from being blocked. 3. I pay for the program once and can use it for the rest of my life.
cons: This program can handle infinite scrolling the best from all others which I have tested but still sometimes there are some problems, e.g. scrolling is finished too early and a lot of data is left, not scraped. However, the problem might caused be the websites being scrolled which might be blocking further actions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great software and support is top notch!
description: I'm very pleased with the software. It does the job!
author: Alexander T.
pros: I have used a lot of simular software and Webharvy has the most features and is the most stable. The support is great.
cons: No real negatives. As soon as you have an issue support will help you out.

review_title: WebHarvy is probably the best value-for-money scraping software you can purchase
description: I am a Market Analyst in a Real Estate Industry. WebHarvy is helping me to get a competitive advantage and to do an excellent work. I truly recommend using it!
author: Darko D.
pros: WebHarvy doesnt cost much. It is really user friendly and easy to use. Also, it is a powerful tool which gives so many options and possibilities. It is really improving the quality of my work, on so many levels. WebHarvy’s support team is really the best. All the compliments!
cons: I would just like to see some additional improvements in further updates, such as cloud service or dealing with CAPTCHA code.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Neel K.
pros: it saves me time and we can get our jobs done quickly!
cons: not anything i can think of yet, but when i need special modifications done to the software they send me great videos to close all my tickets out. They don't just type the email, they SHOW you how to do it. Words are one thing, showing is another. I follow when someone shows me and i can execute. Some people can read and do, I need both reading and doing. They take time out of there day to show you this software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I want to purchase webharvy, i'll also recommend to my friends. The best thing is customer service, their dedication to solve customer query. Specially [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] helped me to solve my query of scraping. I would recommend to everyone to since it would help you to save a lot of time and energy. Also pricing is reasonable.
author: Anu R.
pros: Easy to use, provides many options to calibrate the software.
cons: Speed is slow, It can be improved. otherwise, everything is good.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I'm able to initially get the data i needed... just need to improve the speed if scrapping more than 15+ pages.
author: Anderson S.
pros: I like the product for ease of use. Also no coding needed for you to scrape a website. Also the support is great in helping you to achieve your goal.
cons: When you scrape 15+ pages its too slow to finish it. like 6-8 hours. I think also the csv file im having issues when I import it to a mysqldb.. so i use mysql direct import.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: all good, maybe a instant chat is heful
author: iain S.
pros: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is awesome, He always helped me with all possible solution
cons: delay support, maybe a instant chat is heful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stephanie S.
pros: Webharvey is really is to use and effective. It comes with a great customer support
cons: I love this product and I can't say anything I didn't like

author: Jesper L.
pros: Great features. Will scrape anything anywhere.
cons: A bit hard to use - but support is excellent!

review_title: Great software and wonderful customer support
description: I've been using Webharvy for over 18 months now and I can honestly say it has made my life, and my job, so much easier. The support I get from their team is amazing. No question is too big to ask. And they even provide videos sometimes to help with what I need to be done. They answer right away, and always with a solution! I have tried a few other similar software available, and by far Webharvy is superior to the others out there. For value for money, they are great.
author: Ann D.

description: Great support. Always there to help. It counts.
author: Gennady B.
pros: Love the unlimited use of the software. Excellent support. Provide assistance with scripts.
cons: Somewhat complex to use. You have to understand some coding... Doable if you put your mind into it.

author: Mrinal K.
pros: Customer support was amazing and I can say that support engineer was able to understand my question and help me in all manners.
cons: slowness and not very much control on it. This is good for easy scrapping but conditional scarapping is little hard
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Anson Y.
pros: Easy to navigate and awesome support team. Program doesn't crash even after hours of mining. Stable program
cons: Very useful tool but can be challenging at times to use for non-technical people like us. Sometimes when capturing html strings can cause messed up data
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The program is very intuitive and generally easy to use.
author: Raymond K.
pros: The program is very adaptable. I had a tough website to scrape and needed some assistance. Customer support was available quickly and provided a solution that was well beyond my expectations. These day's, you rarely get such outstanding customer service -- great job Web Harvy Team!!
cons: Not enough documentation on use. There are several videos on YouTube, more of these would be helpful along with examples of regular expressions, etc.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
